allow: Bash(./ffmpeg -f lavfi -i "color=c=black:size=1920x1080:rate=25" -filter_complex "[0:v]geq=r=if(and(gte(X,mod(T*25,1920)),lt(X,mod(T*25,1920)+100),gte(Y,490),lt(Y,590)),255,0):g=if(and(gte(X,mod(T*25,1920)),lt(X,mod(T*25,1920)+100),gte(Y,490),lt(Y,590)),255,0):b=if(and(gte(X,mod(T*25,1920)),lt(X,mod(T*25,1920)+100),gte(Y,490),lt(Y,590)),255,0)[v]" -map "[v]" -t 10 -c:v v210 -f decklink -s 1920x1080 "UltraStudio Mini Monitor")

Bash(./ffmpeg -f lavfi -i "color=c=blue:size=1920x1080:rate=25" -f lavfi -i "sine=frequency=1000:sample_rate=48000" -filter_complex "[0:v]drawtext=text=''ACTUA PARIS'':fontsize=80:fontcolor=white:x=(w-text_w)/2:y=(h-text_h)/2[v]" -map "[v]" -map 1:a -c:v v210 -pix_fmt yuv422p10le -r 25 -field_order tt -flags +ilme+ildct -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f decklink -s 1920x1080 "UltraStudio Mini Monitor")

Bash(./ffmpeg -f lavfi -i "color=c=blue:size=1920x1080:rate=25" -i ~/Pictures/PNG-actua/actua.png -f lavfi -i "sine=frequency=1000:sample_rate=48000" -filter_complex "[0:v]drawtext=text=''ACTUA PARIS'':fontfile=''/System/Library/Fonts/SFNSMono.ttf'':fontsize=80:fontcolor=white:x=(w-text_w)/2:y=100[txt];[txt][1:v]overlay=W-w-10:10[v]" -map "[v]" -map 2:a -c:v v210 -pix_fmt yuv422p10le -r 25 -field_order tt -flags +ilme+ildct -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f decklink -s 1920x1080 "UltraStudio Mini Monitor")

Bash(./ffmpeg -loop 1 -i ~/Pictures/bars.png -i ~/Pictures/PNG-actua/actua.png -f lavfi -i "sine=frequency=1000:sample_rate=48000" -filter_complex "[0:v]drawtext=text=''ACTUA PARIS'':fontfile=''/System/Library/Fonts/SFNSMono.ttf'':fontsize=80:fontcolor=white:x=(w-text_w)/2:y=100[txt];[txt][1:v]overlay=W-w-10:10[v]" -map "[v]" -map 2:a -c:v v210 -pix_fmt yuv422p10le -r 25 -field_order tt -flags +ilme+ildct -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f decklink -s 1920x1080 "UltraStudio Mini Monitor")
